title: Ethos crop descriptor
description: Deterministic JSON descriptor for an evidence crop region emitted by `ethos verify --crop-dir`. This is an audit artifact, not a rendered image crop. The descriptor binds a verification report check to the document fingerprint, page, bbox, and evidence text hash that produced a crop_ref.

crop_ref.description: Stable descriptor filename referenced from verification_report checks[].evidence.crop_ref.

rendering_status.description: Rendered bitmap crops are intentionally out of scope for this artifact version.

text_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the evidence text when the verification check found textual evidence.
